speaker: charlie
text: What a day of good news across the board. From renewable energy milestones to cutting-edge battery tech and strong support for our athletes, Australia's really showing its colours.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely Alex. <cite index='13-20'>With Australia on target to achieve 82% renewable electricity generation by the end of the decade</cite>, we're witnessing history in the making. The future's looking incredibly bright.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right. Whether it's powering our homes with clean energy, breaking new ground in science, or supporting our sporting champions, there's so much to be optimistic about.

speaker: alice
text: Thanks for joining us on ParkSyde Bright Side today. We're back tomorrow with more good news that matters to you and Queensland. Keep shining bright, everyone!

speaker: charlie
text: See you tomorrow, and remember - in a world full of noise, sometimes the brightest news is the good news. This has been Alex and Jamie, catch you later!
